name: Sole Filet with Cream
recipeIngredient: 1 cup heavy cream or creme fraiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the filets and season with lemon juice and salt.
2. Cook mushrooms and shallot in butter until liquid has evaporated.
3. Stir in cream. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Place fish in an oiled baking dish.
5. Cover with sauce. Sprinkle parmesan cheese.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes.
